import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F
import timm


class PPM(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_dim, reduction_dim, bins=(1, 2, 3, 6)):
        super().__init__()
        self.features = nn.ModuleList([
            nn.Sequential(
                nn.AdaptiveAvgPool2d(b),
                nn.Conv2d(in_dim, reduction_dim, 1, bias=False),
                nn.BatchNorm2d(reduction_dim),
                nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            ) for b in bins
        ])

    def forward(self, x):
        h, w = x.shape[2], x.shape[3]
        out = [x]
        for f in self.features:
            out.append(F.interpolate(f(x), size=(h, w), mode='bilinear', align_corners=False))
        return torch.cat(out, 1)


class UperNetHead(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_channels, channels=512, num_classes=150):
        super().__init__()
        # PPM on top stage
        ppm_red = channels // 4
        self.ppm = PPM(in_channels[-1], ppm_red, bins=(1, 2, 3, 6))
        self.ppm_bottleneck = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(in_channels[-1] + ppm_red * 4, channels, 3, padding=1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(channels),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
        )
        # FPN lateral / fpn convs
        self.lateral_convs = nn.ModuleList()
        self.fpn_convs = nn.ModuleList()
        for c in in_channels[:-1]:
            self.lateral_convs.append(nn.Sequential(
                nn.Conv2d(c, channels, 1, bias=False),
                nn.BatchNorm2d(channels),
                nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            ))
            self.fpn_convs.append(nn.Sequential(
                nn.Conv2d(channels, channels, 3, padding=1, bias=False),
                nn.BatchNorm2d(channels),
                nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            ))
        self.fpn_bottleneck = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(channels * len(in_channels), channels, 3, padding=1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(channels),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
        )
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout2d(0.1)
        self.classifier = nn.Conv2d(channels, num_classes, 1)

    def forward(self, feats):
        # feats: list of feature maps, low->high resolution? Actually we expect low-res first? Let's say feats[0] highest res, feats[-1] lowest res
        # PPM on lowest res (feats[-1])
        psp_out = self.ppm_bottleneck(self.ppm(feats[-1]))
        # Build laterals: lateral for feats[0..-2], plus psp_out as top
        laterals = [self.lateral_convs[i](feats[i]) for i in range(len(feats) - 1)]
        laterals.append(psp_out)
        # Top-down
        for i in range(len(laterals) - 1, 0, -1):
            laterals[i - 1] = laterals[i - 1] + F.interpolate(laterals[i], size=laterals[i - 1].shape[2:], mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)
        # FPN convs
        fpn_outs = [self.fpn_convs[i](laterals[i]) for i in range(len(laterals) - 1)]
        fpn_outs.append(laterals[-1])
        # Upsample all to highest res
        target_size = fpn_outs[0].shape[2:]
        for i in range(1, len(fpn_outs)):
            fpn_outs[i] = F.interpolate(fpn_outs[i], size=target_size, mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)
        x = self.fpn_bottleneck(torch.cat(fpn_outs, 1))
        x = self.dropout(x)
        return self.classifier(x)


class FCNAuxHead(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, in_channels, channels=256, num_classes=150):
        super().__init__()
        self.conv = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(in_channels, channels, 3, padding=1, bias=False),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(channels),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
        )
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout2d(0.1)
        self.classifier = nn.Conv2d(channels, num_classes, 1)

    def forward(self, x):
        return self.classifier(self.dropout(self.conv(x)))


class SegModel(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, backbone_name='convnext_large.fb_in22k_ft_in1k', num_classes=150, pretrained=True):
        super().__init__()
        self.backbone = timm.create_model(
            backbone_name,
            pretrained=pretrained,
            features_only=True,
            out_indices=(0, 1, 2, 3),
        )
        ch = self.backbone.feature_info.channels()
        self.head = UperNetHead(in_channels=ch, channels=512, num_classes=num_classes)
        self.aux_head = FCNAuxHead(in_channels=ch[2], channels=256, num_classes=num_classes)

    def forward(self, x):
        h, w = x.shape[2], x.shape[3]
        feats = self.backbone(x)
        out = self.head(feats)
        out = F.interpolate(out, size=(h, w), mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)
        if self.training:
            aux = self.aux_head(feats[2])
            aux = F.interpolate(aux, size=(h, w), mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)
            return out, aux
        return out
